title: gladiolus dolichosiphon
intro: Gladiolus dolichosiphon, also known as the sword lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family (Iridaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus dolichosiphon can be made by infusing the roots or flowers in hot water or using them in a tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety.
